text: Family fun, stunning scenery, forward two, take a break.
Venture into the deep and unique Browns Canyon and experience the quintessential Colorado
River adventure. Leaving the roads and telephone lines behind, the Arkansas River leads down
a corridor of magnificent pink granite and metamorphic rock formations as it tumbles
downhill, creating rapids that are equally breathtaking, literally.
Browns Canyon was awesome. It was a great rafting trip. I loved it. The scenery was
amazing. It was beautiful. It was so much fun. It was definitely a thrill and adventure.
Open to rafters of all ages and abilities, Browns Canyon provides the
perfect opportunity to bond as a family in the rugged outdoors. Take the leap with your
kids off the infamous Jump Rock, enjoy the beautiful canyon views with your spouse, and
scream aloud with everyone down one of the many incredible Class 3 rapids.
It was my first time, so we just saw these higher class rapids and it was just, adrenaline
started pumping and it was just an amazing experience. And once you go over the rapids,
you just get a feeling of weightlessness, much like a roller coaster, and I really enjoyed
that.
The white water in Browns Canyon provides the greatest amount of excitement with the
least amount of danger. Professional AVA guides will show you the best lines in all the rapids,
and with introductory drops like Beaver Falls and Silver Bullet, you're sure to get your
heart racing.
And the excitement doesn't stop there. Downstream loom the rushing waters of Zumflum, where
the river narrows by half, creating a straight chute with huge wave trains and a boat-eating
hole at the end.
Downriver are the seven stairs, a mile long section of pool drop rapids followed by the
notorious Seydelles Suckhole. While many swimming legends are born at Seydelles, it is AVA's
policy to give you a shower, not a bath.
Further down, Twin Falls provides the well-earned finale to an incredible day in Browns Canyon.
I loved the trip down the Arkansas River. It was a blast. The whole group I was with,
we just laughed and played, and it was some of the most beautiful scenery that we had
ever been in. And just the rocks and rapids and everything about it, it just felt safe
but fun and enjoyable and loved it.
Join our full-day Arkansas Valley specialty and enjoy a midday lunch riverside. Guides
will prepare and serve you a double dose of our sizzling fajitas as you take in the incredible
Rocky Mountain surroundings. And if you're in a hurry, take the Browns Canyon Express
for a similar experience in less time.
You can join a tuna event or wear a soft top back while visiting Tuesday's
